programs.title: Forensic Factor: A New Era
programs.desc: Police struggle to identify the body of a woman found floating in the Indian River; with only a piece of nautical rope, a strip of duct tape and some plastic bags to go on, they use every forensic tool they have to catch her killer.

programs.title: Chicago Med
programs.sub_title: In Search of Forgiveness, Not Permission
programs.desc: Dr. Marcel and Dr. Manning lay everything on the line to assist a sick woman; Dr. Halstead faces an uphill battle in getting participants involved in his clinical trial; Dr. Choi clashes with a patient who demands absolute perfection of himself.

programs.title: Chicago Med
programs.sub_title: When Your Heart Rules Your Head
programs.desc: Dr. Halstead finds continued success in his trial; Dr. Charles' daughter, Anna, receives life-changing news; Noah finds himself in a situation not even April can fix.

programs.title: Chicago Med
programs.sub_title: Don't Want to Face This Now
programs.desc: Choi helps a patient with chronic pain find a solution; Halstead considers a new path; Charles and Anna bond over a scary situation.

programs.title: Chicago Med
programs.sub_title: Better Is the Enemy of Good
programs.desc: Halstead runs into trouble when one of his trial patients falls ill; his own stress and symptoms have Choi struggling to get through the day.

programs.title: Chicago Med
programs.sub_title: Fathers and Mothers, Daughters and Sons
programs.desc: Choi hires an old Navy colleague to join him in the ED; a final custody hearing threatens to separate Charles and his daughter; Maggie must make a choice that will change Auggie's life.
